caption: The video features a man performing in front of an audience, likely in a classroom or small auditorium setting. He is wearing a white shirt with a black vest adorned with blue floral embroidery and a red design on the chest. The man has glasses and his hair is tied back. He is holding a guitar and appears to be singing into a microphone, suggesting he is either teaching or entertaining the group. The audience, consisting of children, is seated in front of him, attentively watching and listening. The background consists of wooden blinds, adding a warm and cozy atmosphere to the scene. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, indicating the event may be associated with this organization.
